summary: The diff implements the vast majority of requirements. REQ-25 through REQ-32 are well covered. REQ-33 (migration.mo) is not present in the diff at all. Additionally, the labels in DailySalesReport.tsx and ProductManagement.tsx appear to be in Azerbaijani rather than English as required by REQ-26 and REQ-29.

missing_requirements.requirement: Generate a migration module (migration.mo) that preserves all existing stable data (products map and sales list) when upgrading the canister to the new version that adds the addProduct and deleteProduct functions.
missing_requirements.reason: No migration.mo file was added or modified in the diff. The diff shows 1 added file (ProductManagement.tsx) and 11 modified files, none of which is migration.mo.

missing_requirements.requirement: All labels in English in DailySalesReport.tsx
missing_requirements.reason: The DailySalesReport.tsx file uses Azerbaijani labels (e.g., 'Gəlir', 'Xeyir', 'Ümumi Satılan', 'Gunluk Satis Hesabati') rather than English labels as required by the AC ('All labels in English').

missing_requirements.requirement: All labels in English in ProductManagement.tsx
missing_requirements.reason: The ProductManagement.tsx file uses Azerbaijani labels (e.g., 'Məhsul Idarəetməsi', 'Yeni Məhsul Əlavə Et', 'Əlavə Et') rather than English labels as required by the AC ('All labels in English').
